name: extensor-copy-vs-view-docstrings
description: Document copy-vs-view memory semantics in tensor class docstrings. Use when: (1) a tensor/array class exposes both view-returning and copy-returning access methods without a clear contract documented at the class level, (2) a follow-up issue flags asymmetric documentation between slice() and __getitem__ overloads, (3) a code review finds that _is_view flag semantics are not explained at the field level.
